## Summary

Describe the behavior changed and why it belongs in the emulator hardware or tooling boundary.

## Evidence

- [ ] Hardware manual or datasheet
- [ ] Firmware disassembly/static analysis
- [ ] Runtime trace or device dump
- [ ] Regression test

## Validation

List the commands and runtime scenarios used to verify the change.

## Data check

- [ ] No firmware, NAND image, commercial application, device dump, or generated binary is included.
